entities.name: strength_sessions
entities.context: SQLite database table for logging strength training sessions with fields for date, type, phase, duration, RPE, exercises, and subjective feel

entities.name: Strength Session Logger
entities.context: Python CLI script that inserts workout data into a SQLite database and prints a confirmation summary

entities.name: RPE
entities.context: Rate of Perceived Exertion, a 1-10 scale used to track workout intensity

entities.name: ramp_week1
entities.context: Default training phase value, suggesting a periodized program with ramping progression

entities.name: Periodized Training
entities.context: Training philosophy implied by the phase parameter — structured progression through distinct training phases

entities.name: Subjective Feel Tracking
entities.context: Pre/post workout self-assessment captured via felt_before and felt_after fields

relationships.context: Script inserts workout records into the strength_sessions SQLite table
Captures RPE as an optional intensity metric per session
Records felt_before and felt_after to track subjective energy and recovery
Default phase value indicates a structured periodization scheme with ramping weeks
Both are subjective self-report metrics used to monitor training load and readiness
